items.title: Canada’ PM Mark Carney meets with Ukraine President Zelenskyy in Rome
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney met with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy at the country's Official Residence to the Italian Republic in Rome on Saturday.

items.title: Police and firefighters respond to an explosion rocking Palm Springs, California
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Officials in California say police and firefighters are responding to an explosion that rocked the city of Palm Springs. An investigation is underway.

items.title: Italy’s PM Giorgia Meloni meets Canada’s PM Mark Carney in Rome
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni met with Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney in Rome on Saturday.
Carney, in Rome to attend Pope Leo XIV's investiture mass, said that Canada would build on Italy's presidency of the G7 and take the organisation, "to a new level".

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Marco Rubio meets Archbishop of Bologna in Rome
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>After the meeting, Rubio said of the Vatican's involvement in the Ukraine talks: "We are grateful for their long-standing efforts, not simply on trying to broker peace but on the exchanges of prisoners. There are children that have currently been taken from their homes that the Ukrainians would like to see returned, and they - the Holy See - has been very involved in that regard."


Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: St. Louis mayor says 5 dead, dozens injured after severe storms hit area
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>St. Louis Mayor Cara Spencer said five people died, 38 were injured and more than 5,000 homes were affected in her city after severe storms that hit parts of the U.S. Midwest and South.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Iran says it will continue nuclear talks with US, shrugging off Trump threats
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The negotiations have reached the “expert” level, meaning the sides are trying to reach agreement on the details of a possible deal. But a major sticking point remains Iran’s enrichment of uranium, which Tehran insists it must be allowed to do and the Trump administration increasingly insists the Islamic Republic must give up.


Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Eurovision 2025: LIVE from Switzerland for fan arrivals

items.content:
<article>Live from Switzerland for the grand final of the Eurovision Song Contest. Musical acts from 26 countries will take the stage at the St. Jakobshalle arena on Saturday.

#eurovision #live #switzerland</article>

items.title: How often does the ‘Finals Destination’ cast think about death?
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>"Final Destination: Bloodlines" is all about cheating death. So we asked the stars at the Los Angeles premiere: How often do you think about death?
#finaldestination #finaldestinationbloodlines #shorts</article>

items.title: Eggs are less likely to crack when dropped on their side
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Scientists say this could come in handy to avoid cracking the shell when hard-boiling your breakfast. #shorts #science #eggs</article>

items.title: Arab League summit kicks off in Baghdad with Gaza at top of agenda
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Saturday’s summit comes two months after Israel ended a ceasefire reached with the Hamas militant group in January. In recent days, Israel has launched widespread attacks in Gaza and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has vowed a further escalation of force to pursue his aim of destroying Hamas.


Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Villagers in Kashmir displaced by clashes between India and Pakistan return home with lives upended
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>In the village of Gingal, in Indian-controlled Kashmir, villagers have found their homes damaged and riddled with shrapnel after India and Pakistan agreed to a ceasefire. 

(AP Video by Rafiq Maqbool)

items.title: Nine killed in drone attack on bus in Ukraine's Sumy region
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Nine people were killed and seven injured in a Russian attack on a bus in Ukraine's Sumy region, near the city of Bilopillia on Saturday.

items.title: Missing hiker recounts surviving weeks in California wilderness by foraging and drinking melted snow
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Tiffany Slaton detailed her ordeal during a news conference with the Fresno County Sheriff's Department, two days after she was found in a cabin that the owner had left unlocked in case wayward hikers needed shelter.
